data.biography:
John A. Amos Jr., 27 Aralık 1939 tarihinde Newark, New Jersey, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Oyunculuk kariyerine başlamadan önce oldukça farklı bir yolda ilerleyen Amos, Colorado State Üniversitesi'nde sosyoloji okumuş ve burada Amerikan futbolu oynamıştır. Profesyonel futbol liglerinde kısa bir süre yer aldıktan sonra, oyunculuğa yönelmeden önce bir reklam ajansında metin yazarı olarak çalışmıştır.

Televizyon dünyasına 1970'lerde adım atan Amos, ilk olarak efsanevi sitcom "The Mary Tyler Moore Show"da (1970-1973) canlandırdığı hava durumu sunucusu Gordy Howard karakteriyle tanındı. Ancak onu Amerika'da bir aile babası figürü olarak tanıtan ve şöhrete kavuşturan rol, "Maude" dizisinden türeyen ve çığır açan sitcom "Good Times"ta (1974-1976) canlandırdığı James Evans Sr. karakteri oldu. Çalışkan, gururlu ve ailesine bağlı bir baba olan James Evans, o dönemdeki en önemli siyahi rol modellerinden biriydi. Amos'un, dizinin komediye kayan yönünü eleştirmesi ve karakterin daha gerçekçi yansıtılması konusundaki ısrarı, yapımcılarla yaşadığı anlaşmazlıklar sonucu karakterinin üçüncü sezonun sonunda öldürülmesine ve diziden ayrılmasına neden oldu.

Kariyerindeki en zirve ve en unutulmaz performansını ise 1977 yılında yayınlanan ve televizyon tarihinde bir dönüm noktası olan mini dizi "Kökler"de (Roots) sergiledi. Bu dizide, kaçırılıp köleleştirilen Kunta Kinte'nin yetişkinliğini canlandıran Amos, bu rolüyle Primetime Emmy Ödülü'ne aday gösterildi ve güçlü bir dramatik aktör olarak statüsünü perçinledi.

Sinema kariyerinde de birçok unutulmaz role imza attı. Bunların en bilineni, Eddie Murphy klasiği olan "Amerikan Rüyası" (Coming to America) (1988) filminde canlandırdığı restoran sahibi Cleo McDowell karakteridir. Ayrıca, aksiyon filmi "Zor Ölüm 2"de (Die Hard 2) (1990) canlandırdığı Binbaşı Grant rolüyle de hafızalara kazındı. İlerleyen yıllarda, eleştirmenlerce beğenilen politik drama "The West Wing"de (1999-2004) Amiral Percy Fitzwallace rolüyle de takdir topladı.

Güçlü duruşu, babacan tavrı ve hem komedi hem de dramdaki etkileyici performanslarıyla tanınan John Amos, yarım asrı aşan kariyeri boyunca Amerikan eğlence dünyasının en saygın ve sevilen karakter oyuncularından biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.

data.biography:
Maddie Hasson ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.  Für erste Castings zog sie mit ihrer Mutter nach Los Angeles und beendete dort ihre Highschool über Online-Kurse. Sie bewarb sich für eine Rolle in der von The CW ausgestrahlten Serie The Secret Circle, wurde allerdings nicht engagiert. Kurz darauf wurde sie im Sommer 2011 für den Bones-Ableger The Finder gecasted. In der kurzlebigen Serie spielte sie die Rolle der Willa Monday, einer Roma, die Walter Sherman (Geoff Stults) bei seinen Ermittlungen hilft.

Zuvor war sie bereits in einer kleinen Rolle in Bobcat Goldthwaits schwarzen Komödie God Bless America zu sehen. 2012 übernahm sie eine Gastrolle in der dritten Episode der zweiten Staffel von Grimm und erhielt ihre erste Hauptrolle in der ABC-Family-Mystery-Jugendserie Twisted. Dort spielt sie seit März 2013 neben Avan Jogia und Kylie Bunbury die Rolle der Jo Masterson.
Мэделин "Мэдди" Хассон — американская актриса. Наиболее известна по ролям Уиллы Мондэй в телесериале «Искатель» и Джо Мастерсон в телесериале «Социопат».
data.name: Мэдди Хассон

data.biography: Madelaine "Maddie" Hasson (nacida el 4 de enero de 1995) es una actriz estadounidense. Es mejor conocida por su papel de Willa Monday en la serie de televisión de Fox The Finder.

Maddie Hasson, née le 4 janvier 1995 à Wilmington, en Caroline du Nord, est une actrice américaine qui s'est fait connaître grâce à ses rôles dans plusieurs productions télévisées et cinématographiques. Elle est particulièrement reconnue pour son interprétation de Willa Monday dans la série "The Finder", ainsi que pour son rôle de Jo Masterson dans la série "Twisted".

Maddie Hasson a participé à divers films au cours de sa carrière tels que :

- 2011 : "God Bless America" - Elle incarne Chloe dans ce film satirique réalisé par Bobcat Goldthwait.

- 2013 : "Underdogs" - Dans ce film, elle joue le rôle de Renee Donohue.

- 2015 : "I Saw the Light" - Elle interprète Billie Jean, la seconde épouse du célèbre chanteur Hank Williams.

- 2015 : "A Light Beneath Their Feet" - Dans ce drame, elle joue le personnage de Daschulla.

- 2017 : "Novitiate" - Elle incarne Sœur Sissy dans ce film qui explore la vie d'une jeune novice dans les années 1960.

- 2019 : "We Summon the Darkness" - Elle joue Valerie dans ce thriller d'horreur.

- 2021 : "Malignant" - Dans ce film d'horreur réalisé par James Wan, elle interprète Sydney Lake.

- 2022 : "Taurus" - Elle incarne Ilana dans ce film centré sur un musicien en difficulté.

- 2024 : "Elevation" - Elle joue le rôle de Katie  Maddie Hasson a également eu une carrière notable à la télévision, avec plusieurs rôles marquants :

- 2012 : "The Finder" - Elle est Willa Monday, un personnage central de la série qui suit un détective privé.

- 2012 : "Grimm" - Elle apparaît en tant que Carly Kempfer dans un épisode intitulé "Bad Moon Rising".

- 2013-2014 : "Twisted" - En tant que Jo Masterson, elle fait partie du casting principal de cette série dramatique centrée sur un adolescent accusé d'un meurtre.

- 2017, 2019 : "Mr. Mercedes" - Elle joue Allie Hodges dans plusieurs épisodes de cette série policière basée sur les romans de Stephen King.

- 2018-2019 : "Impulse" - Dans cette série, elle incarne Henrietta "Henry" Coles, une adolescente découvrant ses capacités extraordinaires.

- 2022 : "The Recruit" - Elle apparaît en tant que Karolina dans deux épisodes de cette série d'action.

data.biography:
Jack Bandeira (born March 29, 1994) is an English actor. He is known for his roles in television series Noughts + Crosses, Young Wallander, Vera, Silent Witness, Holby City, Happy Valley and Lockwood & Co. Then he appeared in After Ever Happy, The Silent Twins, Venom: Let There Be Carnage and My Policeman.

In 2013 at age nineteen he made his debut in Middleton as Keith Tate. After that he appeared in many roles in different TV series Holby City, Vera, The Witcher, Sex Education and Noughts + Crosses. He also appeared in Cold Courage, Young Wallander, and Silent Witness.

He also appeared in films The Duke, Gunpowder Milkshake, Venom: Let There Be Carnage, The Silent Twins, After Ever Happy and My Policeman.
data.name: Jack Bandeira

data.biography:
Kristen Holden-Ried (born 1 August 1973) is a Canadian actor best known for his roles as William Compton in the Showtime series The Tudors, Dyson in the Syfy series Lost Girl, and Quint Lane in the film Underworld: Awakening.

Holden-Ried was born in Pickering, Ontario, Canada, in 1973. He studied at Montreal's Concordia University School of Business, but he ultimately decided to pursue a career in acting.

Holden-Ried made his acting debut in 1995, with a starring role in the television movie Young Ivanhoe. He went on to appear in several other television movies and television series, including The Outer Limits, The Dead Zone, and Smallville.

In 2007, Holden-Ried was cast as William Compton in the Showtime series The Tudors. He appeared in the first seven episodes of the series, and his performance was praised by critics.

In 2010, Holden-Ried was cast as Dyson in the Syfy series Lost Girl. He appeared in all five seasons of the series, and his performance was one of the most popular aspects of the show.

In 2012, Holden-Ried played Quint Lane in the film Underworld: Awakening. He reprised the role in the 2016 film Underworld: Blood Wars.

Holden-Ried is also a voice actor. He has voiced characters in several animated television series and video games, including Captain Canuck, Assassin's Creed: Syndicate, and The Legend of Korra.

Holden-Ried is married to actress Erin Krakow. They have two children.
data.name: Kristen Holden-Ried

data.biography:
Milena Smit was born on 5 October 1996 in Elche, Spain. She first started working in show business as a model when she was 15 years old. She worked in her home city and later moved to Madrid in search of career opportunities. Her father is Dutch.

She trained as an actress at the Cristina Rota acting school and was taught by Bernard Hiller, an acting coach of such actors as Leonardo DiCaprio and Cameron Diaz. Before becoming an actress, she was a waitress, shop assistant, babysitter, and information assistant on the subway.

Smit's first film appearances were in various short films such as Diagonales, Innermost, Chimichanga, and Adentro. In 2020, she appeared in her first feature film, Cross the Line, directed by David Victori with Mario Casas. For her work on the film, she was nominated at the Goya Awards for best new actress. The film's casting team discovered the actress via a social network: "After much searching, we found Milena on Instagram. We fell in love with everything she had in common with the character."

After her participation in Cross the Line, she was signed by Pedro Almodóvar for his film Parallel Mothers with Penélope Cruz and Aitana Sánchez-Gijón. In the film, Smit and Cruz play women who become pregnant by accident and befriend each other in the maternity ward. Both characters give birth to girls on the same day. On her performance in the film, director Almodóvar said: "she has an emotional intelligence and a sincerity that are not learned in any school"; he also said her role in the 2020 film Cross the Line was "overwhelming". Smit received a Goya Award nomination for Best Supporting Actress for the role.
data.name: Milena Smit

data.biography: Chen Shu is a Chinese singer and actress, was born in Huangshi, Hubei, in a musical family. Chen graduated from Central Academy of Drama in 2001, where she majored in acting. On 16 September 2011, Chen married Chinese-Australian musician Zhao Yinyin.
data.name: Chen Shu

data.biography: 中国女演员，出身音乐世家。曾在东方歌舞团任舞蹈演员，之后考入中央戏剧学院表演系，2001年进入中国国家话剧院。现为SMG尚世影业签约艺人，至今已参演了多部脍炙人口的影视剧和舞台剧。代表作有电视剧《铁梨花》、《夫妻那些事》，话剧《日出》、《简爱》等。2011年9月17日，陈数与钢琴家赵胤胤在巴厘岛完婚。
data.name: 陈数

data.biography:
Trần Sổ, mỹ nhân sinh năm 1977 sở hữu gương mặt khả ái rất truyền thống và nổi tiếng qua các phim Mối tình nồng thắm ( Khuynh thành chi luyến 2007), Kiến quốc đại nghiệp (2009) và đặc biệt là Husband and Wife (2012). Đặc biệt là bộ phim Tân Bến Thượng Hải hợp tác cùng Huỳnh Hiểu Minh. Cô cũng được mệnh danh là “Mỹ nhân mặc xường xám đẹp nhất” của Cbiz với vẻ cổ điển, thu hút đến lạ kỳ.

Trong những năm gần đây, Trần Sổ luôn gắn liền với phong cách “ngự tỷ”, đóng nhiều vai phụ nữ mạnh mẽ và độc lập chốn công sở với khí chất mạnh mẽ và nét quyến rũ độc đáo không lẫn vào đâu.
data.name: Trần Sổ

data.biography: 中國女演員，出身音樂世家。曾在東方歌舞團任舞蹈演員，之後考入中央戲劇學院表演系，2001 年進入中國國家話劇院。現為 SMG 尚世影業簽約藝人，至今已參演了多部膾炙人口的影視劇和舞台劇。代表作有電視劇《鐵梨花》、《夫妻那些事》，話劇《日出》、《簡愛》等。2011 年 9 月 17 日，陳數與鋼琴家趙胤胤在巴釐島完婚。
data.name: 陳數

data.biography:
Daniel Dae Kim (4 de agosto de 1968) es un actor coreano.

Es conocido por interpretar a Jin-Soo Kwon en la serie de televisión Lost , a Jack Kang en la adaptación cinematográfica de la saga superventas Divergente y a Johnny Gat en la serie del videojuego Saints Row. Actualmente ya no interpreta a Chin Ho Kelly en la serie de televisión Hawaii Five-0 por discrepancias con su contrato.

金大贤出生于韩国，在美国宾夕法尼亚州长大。大学学习的专业是政治学和戏剧，就读过两个学院。

在金大贤出演人气剧集《迷失》(Lost)之前就因在许多科幻剧中扮演角色而出名。虽然金大贤在《迷失》中扮演的角色说韩语，但事实上金大贤平时都说英语，韩语说得一点都不流利。

2005年的时候金大贤被《People》杂志评为最性感的男人之一。除了表演，他还为一个XBOX 360游戏配过音。
data.name: 金大贤

data.biography:
Daniel Dae Kim, né le 4 août 1968 à Busan en Corée du Sud, est un acteur et producteur américain d’origine sud-coréenne.

Né en Corée du Sud, sa famille émigre aux États-Unis alors qu'il n'a que deux ans et Daniel grandit à Easton. Il est diplômé des universités Freedom High School et Haverford College de Pennsylvanie. Dae Kim a étudié l'art et a fait du théâtre à la Bryn Mawr College.

Il est diplômé de l'Université de New York en 1996.

Il est surtout connu pour incarner Jin-Soo Kwon dans le feuilleton télévisé Lost : Les Disparus et Chin Ho Kelly dans Hawaii 5-0. Il a tenu un des rôles principaux de la série 2267, ultime croisade qui est une suite de Babylon 54.

Daniel a aussi obtenu des rôles dans les films Hulk, Spider-Man 2, dans le feuilleton télévisé 24 heures chrono, mais également dans de nombreuses séries télévisées telles que Angel, Charmed, The Shield, Urgences, Le Caméléon, etc.4

Il est également la voix du ninja Rikimaru dans le troisième volet de la série de jeux-vidéo Tenchu4.

En 2006, Dae Kim prête sa voix au personnage de Johnny Gat dans le jeu-vidéo Saints Row. Il fait aussi sa voix dans Saints Row 2 (2008), Saints Row: The Third (2011), Saints Row IV (2013), Saints Row: Gat out of Hell (2015) et Agents of Mayhem (2017)4.

En 2010, Daniel Dae Kim est l’un des personnages principaux de la série Hawaii Five-0, remake de Hawaï police d’État4. Le 30 juin 2017, son départ est annoncé en même temps que celui de sa partenaire Grace Park (Kono Kalakaua), à la suite des refus de la production d'aligner leurs salaires à ceux de Alex O'Loughlin (Steve (Steven) McGarrett) et Scott Caan (Daniel «Danny/Danno» Williams).

En 2015, il fait une apparition dans Divergente 2 : L'Insurrection où il joue Jack Kang, rôle qu'il reprendra l'année suivante dans Divergente 3 : Au-delà du mur4.

En 2017, il devient producteur délégué de la série médicale et dramatique Good Doctor portée par Freddie Highmore qui interprète un jeune docteur autiste savant.

En 2019, il est à l'affiche du film Hellboy7. Il est l'un des rôles principaux du film Always Be My Maybe, qui est disponible sur Netflix8.

En 2020, il rejoint la série New Amsterdam dans le rôle du Dr Shin. Compte tenu du contexte Covid-19, l'épisode où il apparaît pour la 1re fois ne sera pas diffusé en intégralité au cours de la saison mais à une date ultérieure. Cependant, des extraits de cet épisode sont diffusés avant le 18e épisode qui devient le season finale.

Daniel Dae Kim (Puszan, Dél-Korea, 1968. augusztus 4. –) koreai származású amerikai színész. A Lost című sorozat Kvon Dzsinszujaként ismerhetjük. 2010-től a Hawaii Five-0 című amerikai sorozat szereplője.

Kim a dél-koreai Puszanban született, és a pennsylaviai Eastonben nevelkedett. A Freedom High School és a Haverford College hallgatója volt államtudomány és színjátszás szakon. A színjátszást továbbtanulta a Bryn Mawr College-ben.

Mielőtt megkapta Jin szerepét, már olyan sorozatokban játszott, mint az Angel, a 24, a Star Trek: Voyager, a Star Trek: Enterprise, a Crusade, a CSI: A helyszínelők (CSI) vagy a Vészhelyzet (ER). Jin szerepét azért találta szimpatikusnak, mert a látszat ellenére kedves és gyengéd is tud lenni, és realisztikusnak érezte, hogy egy nemzetközi járaton angolul nem beszélő emberek is utaznak. A nehézséget az okozta, hogy Kim alig beszélt valamit koreaiul, hisz anyanyelve az angol.

Kim 2006-ban megkapta a People magazintól a Legszexisebb férfi címet.

Daniel Dae Kim (ur. 4 sierpnia 1968) jest południowokoreańsko-amerykańskim aktorem,  jego matką była Jung Kim, a ojcem Doo-tae Kim. Gdy miał rok, wraz z rodziną przeprowadził się do Stanów Zjednoczonych i dorastał w Nowym Jorku, Easton i Bethlehem w Pensylwanii. Ukończył Freedom High School w Bethlehem w regionie Lehigh Valley we wschodniej Pensylwanii.

W 1990 roku Kim ukończył Haverford College w Haverford w Pensylwanii, uzyskując dwa tytuły licencjata z teatru i nauk politycznych . Podczas nauki w Haverford, semestr wiosenny 1989 roku spędził na studiowaniu w National Theater Institute w Eugene O'Neill Theater Center. Następnie uzyskał tytuł magistra sztuk pięknych w Graduate Acting Program na New York University w 1996 roku. Po ukończeniu studiów Kim zyskał sławę grając liczne role w wielu programach telewizyjnych. Pojawił się w CSI: Kryminalne zagadki Las Vegas jako agent skarbowy, a także w odcinkach Star Trek: Voyager , Star Trek: Enterprise , Czarodziejki, The Shield: Świat glin , Kroniki Seinfelda, Nowojorscy gliniarze i ER . Był stałym gościem w krótkotrwałym spin-offie Babylon 5: Krucjata i miał powtarzające się role w Angel i 24 . Wcielił się również w postać doktora Tsi Chou w miniserialu z 2008 roku opartym na uznanej powieści Michaela Crichtona Andromeda znaczy śmierć .

Kim wyraził obawy dotyczące dyskryminacji Azjatów-Amerykanów w Stanach Zjednoczonych. Po otrzymaniu pozytywnego wyniku testu na COVID-19, wypowiedział się przeciwko ksenofobii i rasizmowi związanemu z pandemią COVID-19 , stwierdzając: „Proszę, proszę, powstrzymajcie uprzedzenia i bezsensowną przemoc wobec Azjatów. ... Tak, jestem Azjatą. I tak, mam koronawirusa. Ale nie złapałem go z Chin, złapałem go w Ameryce. W Nowym Jorku. Pomimo tego, jak niektórzy przywódcy polityczni chcą to nazywać, nie uważam, aby miejsce, z którego pochodzi, było tak ważne jak ludzie, którzy są chorzy i umierają”.

Przed wyborami uzupełniającymi w 2022 r. w Georgii, Kim napisał na Twitterze o stanowych przepisach, które utrudniają studentom Historycznie Czarnych College'ów i Uniwersytetów (HBCU) ustalenie ich uprawnień do głosowania, powołując się na VoteRiders jako źródło dodatkowych informacji o ważnym dowodzie osobistym wyborcy.

12 czerwca 1993 roku Kim poślubił Mię Rhee. Mają dwóch synów urodzonych w 1996 i 2002 roku. Podczas produkcji Lost, Kim i jego rodzina podzielili swoją rezydenturę pomiędzy Los Angeles i Hawaje. Kontynuował swoją rezydenturę na Hawajach po obsadzeniu w Hawaii 5.0.

Kim jest zapalonym kolekcjonerem pięknych zabytkowych zegarków. Niektóre z jego zegarków z osobistej kolekcji były pokazywane w niektórych jego filmach.

Opis powyżej pochodzi z artykułu Wikipedii Daniel Dae Kim, licencjonowanego na podstawie CC-BY-SA, pełna lista współpracowników na Wikipedii.

金大賢出生於韓國，在美國賓夕法尼亞州長大。大學學習的專業是政治學和戲劇，就讀過兩個學院。

在金大賢出演人氣劇集《迷失》(Lost) 之前就因在許多科幻劇中扮演角色而出名。雖然金大賢在《迷失》中扮演的角色説韓語，但事實上金大賢平時都説英語，韓語説得一點都不流利。

2005 年的時候金大賢被《People》雜誌評為最性感的男人之一。除了表演，他還為一個 XBOX 360 遊戲配過音。
data.name: 金大賢

data.biography:
Daniel Dae Kim (Korece: 김대현), 4 Ağustos 1968 tarihinde Busan, Güney Kore'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Henüz bir yaşındayken ailesiyle birlikte Amerika Birleşik Devletleri'ne göç etti ve çocukluğunu Easton, Pensilvanya'da geçirdi. Pensilvanya'daki Haverford College'da tiyatro ve siyaset bilimi dallarında çift anadal yaparak mezun oldu. Oyunculuk tutkusunu profesyonel bir kariyere dönüştürmeye karar verdikten sonra, New York Üniversitesi'nin prestijli Tisch Sanat Okulu'nda oyunculuk alanında yüksek lisans (MFA) derecesi aldı.

Kariyerine 1990'larda tiyatro sahnesinde ve çeşitli televizyon dizilerinde konuk oyuncu olarak başladı. "Angel", "24", "Star Trek: Voyager", "Star Trek: Enterprise" ve "ER" gibi dönemin popüler yapımlarında yer alarak bilimkurgu, aksiyon ve drama türlerindeki çok yönlülüğünü gösterdi. Genellikle otoriter ve ciddi karakterleri canlandırdığı bu roller, onun sektörde tanınan ve saygı duyulan bir karakter oyuncusu olmasını sağladı.

Ancak Daniel Dae Kim'i dünya çapında şöhrete kavuşturan ve kariyerinde bir dönüm noktası olan rol, ABC'nin fenomen dizisi "Lost" (2004-2010) ile geldi. Dizide canlandırdığı, geleneklerine bağlı ve sert mizaçlı Jin-Soo Kwon karakteri, onun uluslararası bir izleyici kitlesiyle buluşmasını sağladı. Karakterin, eşi Sun (Yunjin Kim) ile olan karmaşık ilişkisi ve adada geçirdiği dönüşüm, dizinin en dikkat çekici hikayelerinden biriydi. Neredeyse tamamen Korece olan replikleriyle sergilediği performans, onun oyunculuk yeteneğini gözler önüne serdi ve Hollywood'daki Asyalı-Amerikan temsiliyeti için önemli bir adım oldu. Bu rolüyle Screen Actors Guild (SAG) Ödülü'nü kazanan "Lost" kadrosunun ayrılmaz bir parçası oldu.

"Lost"un ardından Kim, televizyondaki başrol kariyerini CBS'in yeniden çevrimi olan "Hawaii Five-0" (2010-2017) dizisiyle pekiştirdi. Dizide canlandırdığı Chin Ho Kelly karakteriyle yedi sezon boyunca izleyicinin karşısına çıktı ve dizinin en sevilen yüzlerinden biri oldu. Ancak, kendisi ve rol arkadaşı Grace Park'ın, beyaz rol arkadaşlarıyla eşit ücret alamaması nedeniyle yedinci sezonun sonunda diziden ayrılması, sektörde ücret eşitliği tartışmalarını alevlendiren önemli bir olay olarak kayıtlara geçti.

Oyunculuğun yanı sıra Kim, bir yapımcı olarak da sektörde aktif rol almaktadır. Kurduğu 3AD adlı yapım şirketiyle, büyük başarı yakalayan ABC dizisi "The Good Doctor"ın yürütücü yapımcılığını üstlendi. Son yıllarda seslendirme sanatçısı olarak da öne çıkan Kim, Disney'in "Raya ve Son Ejderha" (2021) animasyonunda Benja karakterine ve "Avatar: The Last Airbender"ın (2024) Netflix uyarlamasında Ateş Lordu Ozai karakterine hayat verdi. Daniel Dae Kim, hem ekran önündeki güçlü performansları hem de ekran arkasında çeşitliliği ve eşitliği savunan duruşuyla Hollywood'un en etkili isimlerinden biri olarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.

Daniel Dae Kim wurde am 4. August 1968 in Busan, Südkorea, geboren und ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, Produzent und Synchronsprecher. Er ist bekannt für seine Rollen in Fernsehserien wie „Lost“ (als Jin-Soo Kwon), „Hawaii Five-0“ (als Chin Ho Kelly) sowie Gastrollen in Serien wie „24“, „Angel“ und „Star Trek: Enterprise“. Neben seiner Schauspielkarriere ist er auch Produzent und leitet die Produktionsfirma 3AD, die sich auf Inhalte mit vielfältigen und unterrepräsentierten Charakteren spezialisiert hat, unter anderem produzierte sie die Serie „The Good Doctor“.

Daniel Dae Kim hat neben TV-Rollen auch in Filmen wie „Spider-Man 2“, „The Divergent Series“ und „Hellboy: Rise of the Blood Queen“ mitgewirkt. Auf der Bühne erhielt er Anerkennung für seine Rolle als König von Siam in der Tony-prämierten Produktion „The King and I“. Er wurde mehrfach ausgezeichnet, darunter mit dem Screen Actors Guild Award für das Ensemble von „Lost“ sowie mehreren asiatisch-amerikanischen Kulturpreisen. Zudem war er 2025 in der Time-Liste der 100 einflussreichsten Personen weltweit.

data.name: แดเนียล แด คิม
ダニエル・デイ・キム

data.biography:
Daniel Dae Kim (geboren 4 augustus 1968) is een Zuid-Koreaans-Amerikaanse acteur, vooral bekend van zijn rollen als Chin Ho Kelly in Hawaii Five-0 en Jin-Soo Kwon in Lost.

data.biography: Lexi Rabe  (born June 15, 2012) is an American child actress. This dynamic little eight year old mesmerizes everyone she meets. Heading into first grade she lives a normal life, church, chores, public school, playing with friends but every couple months she takes off a couple weeks or after school and makes a movie. Miss Lexie loves bugs, playing in water and being a princess. She is very outgoing and makes friends where ever she goes, with every age, color, and creed. Lexie loves animals and brings home any stray she can sneak into the house.
data.name: Lexi Rabe

data.biography:
Η Pavadee Komchokpaisan, με το παρατσούκλι Cookkai, είναι ηθοποιός. Αποφοίτησε από το Πανεπιστήμιο Silpakorn στη Σχολή Τεχνολογίας Πληροφορικής και Επικοινωνιών. Ήταν ταλέντο υπό τον Nadao Bangkok, αλλά τώρα είναι ανεξάρτητη.

Είναι συνιδιοκτήτρια ενός καταστήματος φωτογραφίας που ονομάζεται Minimetalprop μαζί με τον φίλο της Sirachuch Chienthaworn (Michael), επίσης πρώην καλλιτέχνη του Nadao Bangkok.

Pavadee Komchokpaisan, nicknamed Cookkai, is an actress. She graduated from Silpakorn University at the Faculty of Information and Communication Technology. She was a talent under Nadao Bangkok, but now she is freelance.

She co-owns a shop of photography called Minimetalprop alongside her boyfriend Sirachuch Chienthaworn (Michael), also a former Nadao Bangkok's artist.
data.name: Pavadee Komchokpaisan

data.biography: José Zúñiga is best known for his roles in films such as Alive, Ransom, Con Air, Fresh, Crooklyn, Next Stop: Wonderland, and Twilight. data.biography:
José Zúñiga, né le 1er avril 1965 à Tegucigalpa au Honduras, est un acteur américano-hondurien. Sa famille s'installe à New York alors qu'il a sept ans.

Devenu acteur, il apparaît dans de nombreux films à partir des années 1990, notamment Les Survivants, Fresh, Crooklyn, Deux cow-boys à New York, Smoke, Money Train, Striptease, La Rançon, Les Ailes de l'enfer, Et plus si affinités, Mafia parano, Les Opportunistes, Traqué, Constantine, Mission impossible 3, Next, Twilight, chapitre I : Fascination, The Call, The Duel et La Tour sombre.

Il joue également dans de nombreuses séries télévisées, dont des rôles récurrents dans Les Experts, The Shield, Ghost Whisperer, Alias, Urgences, Dr House, Desperate Housewives, 24 heures chrono, Prison Break, Grey's Anatomy, Castle, Taxi Brooklyn et Marvel : Les Agents du SHIELD.
何塞·祖尼加 （José Zúñiga） 最出名的是他在《活着》、《赎金》、《Con Air》、《新鲜》、《克鲁克林》、《下一站：仙境》和《暮光之城》等电影中的角色。
data.name: 何塞·祖尼加

data.biography: Janelle Monáe Robinson (born December 1, 1985) is an American singer, songwriter, rapper, record producer, actor, and model from Kansas City, Kansas. She began her musical career in 2003, and released her debut album 'The ArchAndroid' in 2010 which was met with critical acclaim and gained her international recognition. Monáe made her live action acting film debut in the Academy Award winning 2016 film 'Moonlight'. The same year she starred in the biographical drama film 'Hidden Figures' alongside Taraji P. Henson and Octavia Spencer. For her musical work, Monáe has earned eight Grammy Award nominations.
data.name: Janelle Monáe

data.biography: Janelle Monáe Robinson é uma cantora, compositora, rapper, produtora musical, atriz e modelo americana de Kansas City, Kansas.  Ela começou sua carreira musical em 2003 e lançou seu álbum de estréia 'The ArchAndroid' em 2010, que foi aclamado pela crítica e ganhou seu reconhecimento internacional.  Monáe fez sua estréia no cinema de ação ao vivo no filme vencedor do Oscar de 2016 'Moonlight'.  No mesmo ano, ela estrelou o filme de drama biográfico 'Hidden Figures' ao lado de Taraji P. Henson e Octavia Spencer.  Por seu trabalho musical, Monáe ganhou oito indicações ao Grammy.

مغنية وعارضة أزياء وممثلة أمريكية من مواليد 1 ديسمبر 1985 في كنساس، أصدرت أول ألبوم لها (The ArchAndroid) عام 2010، غنت مع فرقة فون أغنية (We are young) والتي احتلت المرتبة الأولى في الولايات المتحدة، شاركت في فيلم (Hidden Figures) الذي رشح لأوسكار أفضل فيلم عام 2017، شاركت في العديد من الأفلام منها (Moonlight، Rio 2، The Equalizer).
data.name: جانيل موناي
เจเนลล์ โมเน

data.biography: Janelle Monáe Robinson, née le 1er décembre 1985 à Kansas City, Kansas, est une actrice et artiste multidisciplinaire dont la carrière cinématographique a réellement décollé à la mi-année 2010. Après avoir été principalement connue pour sa musique, elle fait ses débuts au cinéma notable dans Moonlight (2016), film récompensé par l’Oscar du meilleur film et dans Hidden Figures (2016) où elle incarne Mary Jackson, première ingénieure afro-américaine à la NASA.  Elle poursuit avec des rôles dans Harriet (2019), dans lequel elle joue une figure historique majeure et dans Antebellum (2020), un film mêlant horreur et thriller social. En 2022, elle impressionne dans Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery en incarnant Helen et Cassandra “Andi” Brand.  À la télévision, elle apparaît aussi dans la série Homecoming (saison 2) et d’autres productions, mêlant rôles dramatiques et engagements sociopolitiques. Son jeu se distingue par son intensité, sa capacité à incarner des personnages complexes et engagés, ainsi que sa volonté de faire partie d’histoires aux implications sociales fortes.
data.name: Janelle Monaé

data.biography: Ivy Chen is a Taiwanese actress known for her award-winning performance in "Hear Me" (2009). She has since starred in various popular projects, including crime drama "Black & White", idol TV series "Skip Beat!" (2011), and Doze Niu's "Paradise in Service".
data.name: Ivy Chen

data.biography: 陈意涵（Ivy Chen），1982年11月12日出生于台湾省新北市，华语影视女演员。2006年，她因主演银幕处女作《单车上路》而正式出道。2007年，凭借励志剧《奋斗》被更多内地观众认识。2009年，因主演警匪剧《痞子英雄》而获得韩国首尔国际电视剧奖最佳女演员提名。2010年，凭借剧情片《听说》获得第12届台北电影节最佳女主角。2012年，凭借爱情片《爱LOVE》获得第49届台湾电影金马奖最佳女配角提名。2014年，她又凭借现代片《军中乐园》获得第51届台湾电影金马奖最佳女配角提名。
data.name: 陈意涵

data.biography: 陳意涵（Ivy Chen），1982 年 11 月 12 日出生於台灣新北市，華語影視女演員。2006 年，她因主演銀幕處女作《單車上路》而正式出道。2007 年，憑藉勵志劇《奮鬥》被更多內地觀眾認識。2009 年，因主演警匪劇《痞子英雄》而獲得韓國首爾國際電視劇獎最佳女演員提名。2010 年，憑藉劇情片《聽説》獲得第 12 屆台北電影節最佳女主角。2012 年，憑藉愛情片《愛 LOVE》獲得第 49 屆台灣電影金馬獎最佳女配角提名。2014 年，她又憑藉現代片《軍中樂園》獲得第 51 屆台灣電影金馬獎最佳女配角提名。
data.name: 陳意涵

data.biography: Sun Qian is a Chinese mainland actress, born in 1997 in Harbin, and a graduate of the Central Academy of Drama. Before pursuing acting, she trained in ballet for seven years at the high school affiliated with the Beijing Dance Academy. In May 2017, she gained recognition for starring as Shi Miao in the live-action adaptation of the popular Chinese comic "Take My Brother Away."

2016年，孙千因参演电影处女作《我的青春都是你》而正式进入演艺圈。2017年，主演根据幽灵姐妹同名国漫改编的青春校园偶像剧《快把我哥带走》。2018年，主演都市青春励志剧《我在未来等你》；7月9日，参演的根据神尾叶子漫画《花样男子》改编的青春言情偶像剧《流星花园》首播；同年11月，主演青春偶像剧《淑女飘飘拳》。2020年，主演的古装言情喜剧《萌医甜妻》和都市青春言情剧《拾光里的我们》先后上线。

data.biography:
Jack Hedley (born in London on 28 October 1930 as Jack Hawkins, name changed to avoid confusion with his namesake) was an English actor, best known for his performances on television.

His screen career began in 1950 with a 13-minute drama-documentary about polio called A Life to be Lived. In the 1950s he starred in a number of films and TV appearances, such as Left Right and Centre, Fair Game, and the Alun Owen-scripted No Trams to Lime Street with Billie Whitelaw. He became a TV star in the Francis Durbridge-scripted BBC series The World of Tim Frazer (transmitted from November 1960 to March 1961), the 18 instalments of which comprised three separate serials of six episodes each. He also played Corrigan Blake in Alun Owen's 1962 BBC play You Can't Win 'Em All, the role being taken over by John Turner in the series Corrigan Blake that resulted the following year. He was also in Alun Owen's 'A Little Winter Love'.

He appeared in a number of British films of the 1960s, notably Lawrence of Arabia (1962), The Scarlet Blade (1963), Witchcraft (1964), Of Human Bondage (1964), The Secret of Blood Island (1964) and The Anniversary (1968). He also had roles in several 1970s BBC dramas, such as that of Lt Colonel Preston in Colditz (1972-4) and ex-serviceman Alan Haldane in Who Pays the Ferryman? (1977). Reportedly, the series was marked off-screen by personality clashes between Hedley and his co-stars Betty Arvaniti and Maria Sokali.

Hedley later appeared in the James Bond film For Your Eyes Only as Sir Timothy Havelock, also voicing Havelock's parrot. Soon after this, in the autumn of 1981 he played the lead role (cynical investigative cop Fred Williams) in Lucio Fulci's The New York Ripper (Lo squartatore di New York), in which his voice was dubbed. He also starred with Stanley Baker and Jean Seberg in the film of Irwin Shaw's 'In The French Style'.

Other TV appearances include: The Saint, Gideon's Way (The Alibi Man), Softly, Softly, Dixon of Dock Green, The Buccaneers, Return of the Saint, One by One, Remington Steele, Only Fools and Horses (A Royal Flush), 'Allo 'Allo, Dalziel and Pascoe, and the television film version of Brief Encounter.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jack Hedley,licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Jack Hedley

data.biography:
Mint Chalida Vijitvongthong is an actress, model, and businesswoman born and raised in Bangkok to a Thai-Chinese father and a Thai-Indian mother. She is the elder of four siblings, one of which is "Mond" Tanutchai Wijitvongtong, an actor under GMMTV. She's part of the second generation of Channel 3's young blood actor group called Power 3. Chalida graduated from Srinakharinwirot University with a degree in Business Administration.

Mint first entered the entertainment industry appearing in advertisements at the age of nine. She developed her career as an actor with Channel 3 beginning with the lakorn Narak. Afterwards, Mint continually received work as supporting characters, portraying a variety of roles.

In 2013, Mint was cast in one of her most well-known roles as Piengkwan in Suparburoot Juthathep. She captured many viewers with her portrayal of the beautiful, sympathetic but strong-hearted dancer.

Mint owns an ice cream business called Minito Gelato, She has been in a relationship with Pupaa Taechanarong since 2012.
data.name: Chalida Vijitvongtong

data.biography: 日本演员、模特，stardust事务所所属。 2010年，成为集英社少女时尚杂志《 Seventeen》专属签约模特，以模特身份开始活动。2012年，主演爱情电影《LOVE To RAIN》，作为演员出道；7月，出演校园爱情群像剧《 sprout》。2014年，主演恐怖电影《 零～Zero～》。2015年2月，主演剧情电影《 讨厌女生》；4月，从杂志《 Seventeen》中毕业，专攻演员事业；同年10月，首次担当连续剧主演，主演由小说改编的剧情连续剧《 Teddy Go》。2016年，参演喜剧电影《 Too Young to Die 年轻就死去》。2017年，出演剧情电影《 花战》和漫改电影《 老师！》。

data.biography: Punjan Prama Imanothai is a Thai actor, singer, model, and host. He entered Thai Entertainment when he was 20 years old. He first debuted as a singer in a popular boy band group in 2007 called "Nice2MeetU." After the group disbanded, Punjan did some modeling and entered the small screen. Punjan has done a few films and is continually cast in roles in Thai dramas as the antagonist or the second lead. He studied at the Arts Department of Performing Arts. Punjan has played a support role, paired with Prang Kannarun in the hit drama "Bpoop Phaeh Saniwaat". His friends are Toey Pongsakorn and Pope Tanawat Wattanaputi.
data.name: Prama Imanothai

data.biography:
Blake Woodruff (born June 19, 1995) is an American actor. He is best known for his role as Mike Baker in the film Cheaper by the Dozen.

Woodruff has two older sisters, Ayla and Raina, and a younger brother, Trevor. He decided that he wanted to be an actor at the age of six, and was cast in 2003's Cheaper by the Dozen after an uncredited role in the thriller Blind Horizon. He has since appeared on the television soap opera The Young and the Restless, and reprised his role in Cheaper by the Dozen 2. Woodruff appeared in the film Whisper as David, a young boy from New England, who is kidnapped in hopes the criminals will receive a large ransom.
data.name: Blake Woodruff

data.biography: Julie Anne Peñaflorida San Jose; born May 17, 1994) is a Filipino singer, songwriter, actress, host and television personality. She is dubbed as the "Limitless Star" for her singing prowess and achievements. She is currently an exclusive artist of GMA Network.
data.name: Julie Anne San Jose

data.biography: Wataru Hatano is a Japanese voice actor and singer affiliated with 81 Produce. At the 2nd Seiyu Awards in 2008, Hatano won the Best Male Rookie Award for his roles as Sam Houston in Toward the Terra and Tenshi Yuri in Saint Beast: Kouin Jojishi Tenshitan. Other major roles voiced include Gajeel in Fairy Tail and Yūto Ayase in Nogizaka Haruka no Himitsu. In video games, he voices Josuke Higashikata in the CyberConnect2 developed JoJo's Bizarre Adventure games, and Rufus in the Street Fighter franchise. On April 2, 2018 he announced his marriage with fellow voice actress Mai Hashimoto.
data.name: Wataru Hatano

data.biography:
羽多野涉（日语：羽多野 渉／はたの わたる Hatano Wataru，1982年3月13日—）是日本的男性声优、歌手。长野县东筑摩郡朝日村出身，身高171cm。血型为O型。隶属于81 Produce事务所。

主要代表作品和角色有：《乃木坂春香的秘密》绫濑裕人、《染红的街道》长濑准一、《好想告诉你》真田彻、《火影忍者》少年弥彦、《妖精的尾巴》伽吉鲁·雷特福克斯、《热砂的乐园》卡利姆、《要听爸爸的话！》濑川佑太、《亚尔斯兰战记》、《月歌》文月海、《信长的忍者》织田信长、《狐妖小红娘》白月初等。
data.name: 羽多野涉

data.biography:
Wataru Hatano (羽多野 渉, Hatano Wataru, nacido el 13 de marzo de 1982) es un actor de doblaje (seiyuu) y cantante japonés afiliado a 81 Produce y perteneciente al sello discográfico DIVE II entertainment. Tambien se le conoce como w.hatano.

En la segunda edición de los Premios Seiyu en 2008, Hatano ganó el premio al mejor actor revelación masculino por sus papeles de Sam Houston en Terra e… y Tenshi Yuri en Saint Beast: Kouin Jojishi Tenshi Tan. Otros papeles importantes a los que puso voz incluyen a Gajeel en Fairy Tail y Yūto Ayase en Nogizaka Haruka no Himitsu. En videojuegos, da voz a Josuke Higashikata en los juegos JoJo's Bizarre Adventure desarrollados por CyberConnect2 y a Rufus en la franquicia Street Fighter. El 2 de abril de 2018 anunció su matrimonio con la también actriz de doblaje Mai Hashimoto.
data.name: Wataru Hatano

data.biography: Christina María Aguilera (born December 18, 1980) is an American pop singer and songwriter. Aguilera first appeared on national television in 1990 as a contestant on the Star Search program, and went on to star in Disney Channel's television series The Mickey Mouse Club from 1993–1994. Aguilera signed to RCA Records after recording "Reflection" for the film Mulan. In 1999, Aguilera came to prominence following her debut album Christina Aguilera, which was a commercial success spawning three number one singles on the Billboard Hot 100 "Genie in a Bottle", "What a Girl Wants" and "Come On Over Baby (All I Want Is You)".  A Latin pop album, Mi Reflejo (2001), and several collaborations followed which garnered Aguilera worldwide success, though she was displeased with her lack of input in her music and image. After parting from her management, Aguilera took creative control over her second studio album, Stripped (2002, The album's second single, "Beautiful", was a commercial success and helped the album's commercial performance. Aguilera's third studio album, Back to Basics (2006), included elements of soul, jazz, and blues music, and was released to positive critical reception. Aguilera's fourth studio album Bionic was released in June 2010. Aside from being known for her vocal ability, music videos and image, musically, she includes themes of dealing with public scrutiny, her childhood, and female empowerment in her music. Apart from her work in music, she has also dedicated much of her time as a philanthropist for charities, human rights and world issues. Aguilera's work has earned her numerous awards, including five Grammy Awards and two Latin Grammy Award, amongst twenty-one and eleven nominations respectively. Rolling Stone ranked her number fifty-three on their list of the 100 Greatest Singers of All Time, ranking as the youngest and only artist on the list under the age of thirty. She has become one of the most successful recording artists of the decade, selling more than 75 million albums worldwide.
data.name: Christina Aguilera

data.biography:
Christina María Aguilera (Nova Iorque, 18 de dezembro de 1980) é uma cantora, compositora e atriz norte-americana. Nascida em Staten Island, Nova Iorque e criada nas cidades de Rochester e Wexford, na Pensilvânia, ela apareceu nos programas de televisão Star Search e The Mickey Mouse Club no início da carreira. Depois de gravar "Reflection", o tema do filme Mulan, da Disney, Aguilera assinou com a RCA Records. Ela ganhou destaque com seu álbum de estreia autointitulado (1999), que gerou três singles número um na parada Billboard Hot 100: "Genie in a Bottle", "What a Girl Wants" e "Come On Over Baby (All I Want Is You)" . No ano seguinte, Aguilera lançou dois álbuns de estúdio; o álbum em espanhol Mi Reflejo e o álbum natalino My Kind of Christmas.

Ela assumiu o controle criativo de sua carreira em seu quarto álbum de estúdio, Stripped (2002), que produziu "Dirrty", "Beautiful" e "Fighter". O quinto álbum de estúdio de Aguilera, Back to Basics (2006), estreou no número um nas paradas de álbuns de dez países e gerou as faixas "Ain't No Other Man" e "Hurt". Em 2010, ela lançou seu sexto álbum de estúdio, Bionic, e estrelou o filme Burlesque. No ano seguinte, estreou como mentora na série de televisão The Voice; ela já apareceu em seis de suas doze temporadas. O seu sétimo álbum de estúdio, Lotus, foi lançado em 2012. Em 2018, lançou seu oitavo álbum de estúdio, Liberation. Aguilera também foi destaque em várias colaborações bem sucedidas durante sua carreira, incluindo "Lady Marmalade", "Moves Like Jagger" e "Say Something".

Aguilera é reconhecida como um ícone pop e foi chamada de "Princesa do Pop" após sua estreia. Seu trabalho rendeu cinco Grammy Awards, dois Grammy Latino e uma estrela na Calçada da Fama de Hollywood. Ela vendeu mais de 40 milhões de álbuns e singles nos Estados Unidos até 2014 e 100 milhões mundialmente. Em 2009, classificou-se no número 58 na lista das 100 Maiores Cantoras de Todos os Tempos, da revista Rolling Stone, tornando-se a mais jovem e única artista com menos de 30 anos no ranking. A Billboard norte-americana reconheceu-a como a 20ª artista mais bem sucedida da década de 2000, e a Time listou Aguilera entre as 100 pessoas mais influentes do mundo em 2013. Além de seu trabalho na indústria do entretenimento, Aguilera está envolvida em atividades de caridade, direitos humanos e questões mundiais, além de seu trabalho como embaixadora da ONU para o Programa Alimentar Mundial.

data.overview: Yuuna, Mimori, Fuu và Itsuki đều là thành viên của câu lạc bộ "Anh hùng dũng cảm" tại trường trung học Sanshu. Họ chủ yếu giúp đỡ những người cần sự giúp đỡ. Một ngày nọ, họ bất ngờ bị một chùm ánh sáng đưa đến một khu rừng kỳ lạ. Ở đó, họ gặp những con quái vật kỳ lạ và độc ác, được gọi là "Vertex", được gửi đến để phá hủy thế giới. Với sự giúp đỡ của một ứng dụng đặc biệt trên điện thoại, bốn thành viên có thể biến hình và trở thành những anh hùng thực sự, những người giờ đây phải bảo vệ thế giới của họ.

data.biography: Mirai Shida (志田 未来 Shida Mirai, born May 10, 1993) is a Japanese actress well-known for her roles in the 2006 television series "14-year-old Mother" which established her as a talented young talent in the industry. She also received critical acclaim for her role in the 2009 movie "Nobody To Watch Over Me".
data.name: Mirai Shida

data.biography:
志田未来（日语：志田 未来／しだ みらい Shida Mirai，1993年5月10日—）为日本神奈川县出身的女演员。现隶属于研音，于2006年4月由日本中央儿童剧团移籍。

1999年6岁加入日本中央儿童剧团。2000年7岁时拍摄第一部电视剧《永远的1/2》。2005年播出的《女王的教室》中志田未来饰演与天海佑希对抗的学生因而受到注目。2006年4月由日本中央儿童剧团移籍，转入研音事务所；10月初主演电视剧《14岁的母亲》，有突破性的演出。2008年因主演电视剧《正义的伙伴》获日剧学院赏最佳女主角。2009年10月主演秋季电视剧《小公主》。2010年主演电视剧《秘密》。2010年初为动画《借东西的阿丽埃蒂》主演配音。2013年由于多次去迪士尼被选中出演WOWOWプライム《ふしぎの森のディズニー学校》担任该宣传主人公。2015年为《明日世界》日本版主演配音；11月出演电视剧《纯白》和舞台剧《オレアナ》。2016年，出演电影《グッドモーニングショー》和《青空呐喊》；主演苦情纯爱电影《爱哭鬼小丑的婚礼》；参演SP《检察官的死命》和悬疑剧《风中的樱香》。2017年，主演8月5日在东海台深夜播出的新剧《猪笼草的梦》。

2018年9月14日，志田未来通过所属事务所发布消息，她与一名圈外男性在9月成婚。
data.name: 志田未来

data.biography: 日本女演員，隸屬於研音。 1999 年 6 歲加入日本中央兒童劇團。2000 年 7 歲時拍攝第一部電視劇《永遠的 1/2》。2005 年播出的《女王的教室》中志田未來飾演與天海佑希對抗的學生因而受到注目。2006 年 4 月由日本中央兒童劇團移籍，轉入研音事務所；10 月初主演電視劇《14 歲的母親》，有突破性的演出。2008 年因主演電視劇《正義的夥伴》獲日劇學院賞最佳女主角。2009 年 10 月主演秋季電視劇《小公主》。2010 年主演電視劇《祕密》。2010 年初爲動畫《借東西的阿麗埃蒂》主演配音。2013 年由於多次去迪士尼被選中出演 WOWOWプライム《ふしぎの森のディズニー學校》擔任該宣傳主人公。2015 年爲《明日世界》日本版主演配音；11 月出演電視劇《純白》和舞台劇《オレアナ》。2016 年，出演電影《グッドモーニングショー》和《青空吶喊》；主演苦情純愛電影《愛哭鬼小丑的婚禮》；參演 SP《檢察官的死命》和懸疑劇《風中的櫻香》。2017 年，主演 8 月 5 日在東海台深夜播出的新劇《豬籠草的夢》。 2018 年 9 月 14 日，志田未來通過所屬事務所發佈消息，她與一名圈外男性在 9 月成婚。
data.name: 志田未來

data.biography: 2001年,只有7岁的巴尔在当地的一个俱乐部表演了一部儿童剧《玩具营地》。她出演的角色“泰德·e·熊”,她的表演生涯开始了。在接下来的三年里,巴尔参加了十个儿童剧演出,并在9岁时宣布，她需要一个代理,这样她就可以转移到电影和电视的项目。  此后，她参加了NBC电视台的《Crossing Jordan》，在迪士尼和尼克电视台（美国知名的有线电视频道，主营儿童节目）。2005年巴尔搭档肖恩·惠伦在黑色短戏剧《road kill》赢得了当年的纽约恐怖电影节的观众选择奖。同时担任美国 Encore Channel（喝彩频道）的《Fear Fest: 31 Nights of Horror》的主持人。她也曾代言过各种商业广告,也曾在一些比较流行的电视游戏里配音。并且继续在舞台上表演一些戏剧只要在时间上允许。  目前，巴尔在美国查普曼大学主修戏剧。
data.name: 塔拉·林内·巴尔

data.biography:
2001 年, 只有 7 歲的巴爾在當地的一個俱樂部表演了一部兒童劇《玩具營地》。她出演的角色“泰德·e·熊”, 她的表演生涯開始了。在接下來的三年裏, 巴爾參加了十個兒童劇演出, 並在 9 歲時宣佈，她需要一個代理, 這樣她就可以轉移到電影和電視的項目。

此後，她參加了 NBC 電視台的《Crossing Jordan》，在迪士尼和尼克電視台（美國知名的有線電視頻道，主營兒童節目）。2005 年巴爾搭檔肖恩·惠倫在黑色短戲劇《road kill》贏得了當年的紐約恐怖電影節的觀眾選擇獎。同時擔任美國 Encore Channel（喝彩頻道）的《Fear Fest: 31 Nights of Horror》的主持人。她也曾代言過各種商業廣告, 也曾在一些比較流行的電視遊戲裏配音。並且繼續在舞台上表演一些戲劇只要在時間上允許。

目前，巴爾在美國查普曼大學主修戲劇。
data.name: 塔拉·林內·巴爾

data.biography:
Heidi Lynn Gardner (born July 27, 1983) is an American actress, comedian, and writer. She has been a cast member on the NBC sketch comedy series Saturday Night Live since season 43 in 2017, when she debuted as a featured player.

In 2014, Gardner joined the Sunday Company and a year later after a promotion to the Main Company, she quit her job as a hairstylist to focus on acting. During that time, she became a voice actress, regularly appearing on animated series incuding Bratz, SuperMansion, and Mike Tyson Mysteries. In 2017, she joined the cast of Saturday Night Live (SNL) along with Luke Null and Chris Redd for its forty-third season.

After her first year on SNL, Gardner was hired to play Leonor in the Ben Falcone-directed film Life of the Party, alongside Melissa McCarthy, Falcone's wife. On August 28, 2019, TVLine reported that Gardner would have a guest role on the NBC comedy series Superstore, playing Dina Fox's nemesis Colleen who is transferred to Store 1217 after Cloud 9's Bel-Ridge location is shut down.
data.name: Heidi Gardner

data.biography: Tina Krause was born on July 29, 1970 in Queens, New York. Krause graduated from the School of Visual Arts in New York City with a degree in Graphic Design and 3D illustration. Tina worked as an artist and graphic designer prior to embarking on an acting career after being discovered by director/producer Gary Whitson at a spring Chiller Theatre horror convention in New Jersey in 1994. Besides acting primarily in horror films, Krause has also worked as a model and continues to work as a graphic designer in between acting assignments. Tina directed her first movie in 2001. She lives in Brooklyn, New York.
data.name: Tina Krause

data.biography:
Stéphane Caillard (born 1 October 1988) is a French film and television actress. Since 1999, she has appeared in various films and drama series on French television. In 2004, she played Camille Dassin, the daughter of Richard Bohringer's character in the TV series Doctor Dassin.

Caillard attended acting classes at INSAS Brussels and studied at the Asnières Studio-Theatre. In 2011, she appeared in Les Lyonnais, a film directed by Olivier Marchal. In 2012, she joined the Compagnie du Boramar in Collioure, with which she appeared in two plays by Molière. She won her first major role in 2015, playing Alma, one of the three heroines in the series La Vie devant elles, and then Julia Taro, in the TV series Marseille.

Source: Article "Stéphane Caillard" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.
data.name: Stéphane Caillard

data.biography:
Kotono Mitsuishi is a Japanese voice actress and narrator from Toda, Saitama. She was affiliated with Arts Vision and Lasley Arrow. As a young girl, Mitsuishi lived in Nagareyama, Chiba. Mitsuishi graduated from high school in 1986, and entered the Katsuta Voice Actor's Academy.

In 1988, Mitsuishi made her voice acting debut as Tomoyo in the OVA Ace wo Nerae! 2. She became an instant celebrity with her role as Usagi Tsukino, when Sailor Moon debuted in 1992, and her popularity increased again with her role as Misato Katsuragi in the anime television series Neon Genesis Evangelion, as well as Murrue Ramius in both Mobile Suit Gundam SEED and Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny, in 2002 and 2004 respectively.
data.name: Kotono Mitsuishi

data.biography:
Kotono Mitsuishi (三石 琴乃, Mitsuishi Kotono, nacida el 8 de diciembre de 1967) es una actriz de voz (seiyuu), actriz y narradora japonesa de Toda, Saitama. Estuvo afiliada a Arts Vision y Lasley Arrow. Cuando era niña, vivía en Nagareyama, Chiba. Se graduó de la escuela secundaria en 1986 y entró en la Academia de Actores de Voz de Katsuta.

En 1988, Mitsuishi hizo su debut como actriz de voz como Tomoyo en el OVA Ace wo Nerae! 2. Se convirtió instantáneamente en una celebridad gracias a su papel de Usagi Tsukino en la serie de anime televisivo Sailor Moon estrenada en 1992, y su popularidad aumentó nuevamente con su papel de Misato Katsuragi en la serie de televisión de anime Neon Genesis Evangelion, así como Murrue Ramius en Mobile Suit Gundam SEED y Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny, estrenadas en 2002 y 2004 respectivamente.
data.name: Kotono Mitsuishi

data.biography: "จียอน หรือ ซอ จียอน" เกิด 11 พฤศจิกายน 2529 นักแสดง นักร้อง และนางแบบชาวเกาหลีใต้ ส่วนชื่อ จียอน นั้นคุณตาเป็นคนตั้งให้ เมื่อเธออายุได้ 11 ปี จียอนย้ายเข้ามาอาศัยในประเทศไทย หลังจากที่บิดาย้ายเข้ามาทำงานได้สักพัก ปัจจุบัน บิดา มารดา พี่ชาย และน้องสาว ย้ายเข้ามาอาศัยในประเทศไทยทั้งครอบครัง ด้านการศึกษาจียอนจบการศึกษาระดับมัธยมศึกษา จากโรงเรียนร่วมฤดีวิเทศศึกษา ช่วงเวลานั้นเธอมักจะถูกเพื่อนที่โรงเรียนล้อเลียนเรื่องภาษา เพราะพูดไม่ได้ทั้งไทยและอังกฤษ จึงท้อใจและอยากกลับบ้านเกิด แต่ได้รับกำลังใจที่ดีจากคุณพ่อทำให้เธอเข้มแข็งจนถึงทุกวันนี้ หลังจากนั้นจียอนได้เข้าศึกษาคณะศิลปศาสตร์ มหาวิทยาลัยอัสสัมชัญ วิชาเอก คือ ภาษาญี่ปุ่นธุรกิจ

data.biography: Richard de Pearsall Pearson (1 August 1918 – 2 August 2011) was an English character actor, who appeared in numerous film, television and stage productions over a period of 65 years. He played leading roles in several London West End plays and also supported Maggie Smith, Robert Morley and others in long-running West End stage productions. His many screen appearances included character parts in three Polanski films.
data.name: Richard Pearson

data.biography: 理查德·皮尔森（1918 年 8 月 1 日 - 2011 年 8 月 2 日）是一位英国角色演员，在 65 年的时间里出现在众多电影、电视和舞台作品中。他曾在伦敦西区的几部戏剧中担任主角，并在长期上演的西区舞台作品中支持玛吉·史密斯、罗伯特·莫利等人。他的许多银幕露面包括三部波兰斯基电影中的角色。
data.name: 理查德·皮尔森

data.biography: 理查德·皮爾森（1918 年 8 月 1 日 - 2011 年 8 月 2 日）是一位英國角色演員，在 65 年的時間裏出現在眾多電影、電視和舞台作品中。他曾在倫敦西區的幾部戲劇中擔任主角，並在長期上演的西區舞台作品中支持瑪吉·史密斯、羅伯特·莫利等人。他的許多銀幕露面包括三部波蘭斯基電影中的角色。
data.name: 理查德·皮爾森

data.biography:
"Bank" Thiti Mahayotaruk is an actor who broke into the entertainment industry as an auditionee in the reality show "Hormones: The Next Gen," a casting show for the second and third seasons of the series "Hormones." Bank eventually became part of the final six of the show. He made his acting debut in "Hormones 2" in a supporting role appearing in a few episodes of the series before becoming one of the leads in "Hormones 3," the final season.

Bank is currently dating Pimtha Thanida Manalertruangkul. Together, they started a YouTube channel "ThitiThani Channel" in 2022.
data.name: Thiti Mahayotaruk
ธิติ มหาโยธารักษ์

data.biography:
Lee Do‑yeun, nacida el 26 de diciembre de 1985 en Daegu (Corea del Sur), es una actriz surcoreana activa principalmente en televisión y cine. Estudió en el Departamento de Creación Escénica de la Universidad de las Artes de Seúl y posteriormente en el Departamento de Interpretación de la Universidad de Artes Visuales de Corea. Está representada por la agencia Gazi Contents.

Comenzó a aparecer en producciones audiovisuales a partir de 2013, participando en diversas series de televisión y películas en papeles secundarios. Además de su actividad en ficción, apareció en el programa de entretenimiento «Come Back Home» (KBS2) en 2021, en el episodio dedicado al barrio de Ssangmun‑dong.
data.name: Lee Do-yeun

data.biography:
白宇，1990年4月8日出生于陕西省榆林市吴堡县，中国内地男演员，毕业于中央戏剧学院表演系2009级。

2014年主演国内首部网络贺岁剧《屌丝日记》 。同年出演历史剧《少帅》。2015年1月主演情感励志剧《长大》，4月出演都市爱情剧《云巅之上》，8月出演浪漫爱情剧《微微一笑很倾城》，9月出演青春情感剧《你好乔安》。
data.name: 白宇

data.biography:
Ο Bai Yu (αγγλικό όνομα: Johnny), γεννημένος στο Xi'an, στην επαρχία Shaanxi, είναι Κινέζος ηθοποιός. Αποφοίτησε από την Κεντρική Δραματική Ακαδημία με πτυχίο στην παράσταση.

Το 2014, ο Bai έκανε το ντεμπούτο του ως ηθοποιός στο διαδικτυακό δράμα "0.5 Diors". Το 2015 ο Bai πρωταγωνίστησε στο συναισθηματικό και εμπνευσμένο ιατρικό δράμα για νέους «Grow Up», υποδυόμενος έναν επαναστατικό αλλά ρεαλιστικό ασκούμενο. Την ίδια χρονιά συμμετείχε σε δύο μοντέρνα ρομαντικά δράματα "Above the Clouds" και "Hello, Joann".

Το 2016 ο Bai κέρδισε ευρεία αναγνώριση με τον ρόλο του στο αντι-ιαπωνικό δράμα «Young Marshal». Η αναγνώρισή του αυξήθηκε περαιτέρω με τον δεύτερο ρόλο του στην επιτυχημένη ρομαντική κωμωδία «Love O2O». Στη συνέχεια επιλέχθηκε ως ο πρωταγωνιστής στο διαδικτυακό δράμα μυστηρίου εγκλήματος "Memory Lost" που βασίζεται σε ένα ομώνυμο μυθιστόρημα του Ding Mo. Η σειρά έγινε δεκτή στην Κίνα και αύξησε τη δημοτικότητα του Bai. Το 2017, ο Bai πρωταγωνίστησε στην πατριωτική ταινία "The Founding of an Army" όπου έλαβε θετικές κριτικές για την ερμηνεία του.

Το 2018 έπαιξε στο διάσημο μελόδραμα "Suddenly This Summer". Την ίδια χρονιά, εμφανίστηκε στο πλευρό του Zhu Yilong στο διαδικτυακό δράμα «Guardian» βασισμένο στο ομώνυμο μυθιστόρημα του Priest. Το δράμα ανέπτυξε μια διαδικτυακή λατρεία που οδήγησε στην αύξηση της δημοτικότητας των ηθοποιών.

Ο Bai συμπεριλήφθηκε στο τεύχος Forbes China 30 Under 30 Asia 2017, το οποίο περιλαμβάνει 30 άτομα με επιρροή κάτω των 30 ετών που είχαν σημαντική επίδραση στους τομείς τους.

Το 2019, ο Bai έκανε την πρώτη του εμφάνιση στο Spring Gala του CCTV, ερμηνεύοντας το τραγούδι "Child of Generation". Την ίδια χρονιά, πρωταγωνίστησε στο δράμα της ρεπουμπλικανικής εποχής «Detective Li» για το οποίο κέρδισε την υποψηφιότητα καλύτερου ηθοποιού για το Golden Bud-The Fourth Network Film and Television Festival. Συμμετείχε επίσης στο οικογενειακό δράμα «Looking Up» που του χάρισε το «Breakthrough Film Actor» στα βραβεία Tencent Vido All Star Awards καθώς και το βραβείο «Κινηματογραφικός ηθοποιός της χρονιάς» στη Λευκή Βίβλο της Tencent Entertainment.

Στις 16 Μαρτίου 2019, ψηφίστηκε 48ος στα 100 πιο όμορφα πρόσωπα στο LikeTCCAsia Asia Pacific. Στις 20 Αυγούστου 2019, ο Bai Yu κατέλαβε την 36η θέση στη λίστα Forbes China 100 Celebrity List. Στις 27 Αυγούστου 2020, ο Bai Yu κατέλαβε την 68η θέση στη «Λίστα Κινέζων Διασημοτήτων του Forbes».

白宇，1990 年 4 月 8 日出生於陝西省榆林市吳堡縣，中國內地男演員，畢業於中央戲劇學院表演系 2009 級。

2014 年主演國內首部網絡賀歲劇《屌絲日記》 。同年出演歷史劇《少帥》。2015 年 1 月主演情感勵志劇《飛越未來》，4 月出演都市愛情劇《雲巔之上》，8 月出演浪漫愛情劇《微微一笑很傾城》，9 月出演青春情感劇《你好喬安》。
data.name: 白宇

data.biography: Devadarshini 是一位印度女演员，出演泰米尔语电影和电视剧。她的职业生涯始于电视主播，然后涉足演艺事业，先是在电视上，后来在电影中。她主要出演配角，经常扮演喜剧角色。

data.biography:
Isabella India Jane Laughland (born April 26, 1991) is a British actress. She began her career in the Harry Potter films Half Blood Prince (2009) and Deathly Hallows: Part 1 (2010) and Part 2 (2011). She went on to star in Urban Hymn (2015) and Chubby Funny (2016). Her other films include Now Is Good (2012), Slaughterhouse Rulez (2018), Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool (2017), and Good Luck to You, Leo Grande (2022).

On television, she is known for her roles in the Black Mirror episode "Fifteen Million Merits" (2011), the BBC Two comedy-drama Trigonometry (2020), and the Channel 5 miniseries Anne Boleyn (2021). She also had recurring roles in the Channel 4 drama Chimerica (2019), the BBC One sitcom Ghosts (2019) and drama Four Lives (2022), and a voice role in The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance (2019) on Netflix.

Laughland is a regular performer on stage, starring in the National Theatre productions of Greenland (2011) and The Last of the Haussmans (2012). In 2010, she was nominated for Outstanding Newcomer at the Evening Standard Theatre Awards for her performance in Wanderlust at the Royal Court Theatre.
data.name: Isabella Laughland

data.biography:
伊莎贝拉·印度·简·劳兰德（1991年4月26日-），英国女演员。她的职业生涯始于哈利波特电影《混血王子》（2009 年）和《死亡圣器：第 1 部分》（2010 年）和第 2 部分（2011 年）。她继续出演了《城市赞美诗》（2015 年）和《胖乎乎的滑稽》（2016 年）。她的其他电影包括《现在很好》（2012 年）、《屠宰场鲁兹》（2018 年）、《电影明星不会死在利物浦》（2017 年）和《祝你好运，里奥格兰德》（2022 年）。

在电视上，她因在《黑镜》剧集《一千五百万功德》（2011 年）、BBC 两部喜剧《三角学》（2020 年）和第 5 频道迷你剧《安妮·博林》（2021 年）中的角色而闻名。她还在第 4 频道电视剧《奇美里卡》（2019 年）、BBC One 情景喜剧《幽灵》（2019 年）和电视剧《四条命》（2022 年）中反复出演角色，并在 Netflix 的《黑水晶：抵抗时代》（2019 年）中担任配音角色。

劳兰德是舞台上的常客，主演了格陵兰国家剧院的作品（2011年）和最后的奥斯曼人（2012年）。2010年，她因在皇家宫廷剧院的《流浪癖》中的表演而被提名为晚间标准戏剧奖的杰出新人。
data.name: 伊莎贝拉·劳兰德

data.biography:
伊莎貝拉·印度·簡·勞蘭德（1991 年 4 月 26 日-），英國女演員。她的職業生涯始於哈利波特電影《混血王子》（2009 年）和《死亡聖器：第 1 部分》（2010 年）和第 2 部分（2011 年）。她繼續出演了《城市讚美詩》（2015 年）和《胖乎乎的滑稽》（2016 年）。她的其他電影包括《現在很好》（2012 年）、《屠宰場魯茲》（2018 年）、《電影明星不會死在利物浦》（2017 年）和《祝你好運，里奧格蘭德》（2022 年）。

在電視上，她因在《黑鏡》劇集《一千五百萬功德》（2011 年）、BBC 兩部喜劇《三角學》（2020 年）和第 5 頻道迷你劇《安妮·博林》（2021 年）中的角色而聞名。她還在第 4 頻道電視劇《奇美裏卡》（2019 年）、BBC One 情景喜劇《幽靈》（2019 年）和電視劇《四條命》（2022 年）中反覆出演角色，並在 Netflix 的《黑水晶：抵抗時代》（2019 年）中擔任配音角色。

勞蘭德是舞台上的常客，主演了格陵蘭國家劇院的作品（2011 年）和最後的奧斯曼人（2012 年）。2010 年，她因在皇家宮廷劇院的《流浪癖》中的表演而被提名為晚間標準戲劇獎的傑出新人。
data.name: 伊莎貝拉·勞蘭德

data.biography:
Richard Milhous Nixon (January 9, 1913 – April 22, 1994) was the 37th president of the United States, serving from 1969 to 1974. A member of the Republican Party, Nixon previously served as the 36th vice president from 1953 to 1961, having risen to national prominence as a representative and senator from California. After five years in the White House that saw the conclusion to the U.S. involvement in the Vietnam War, détente with the Soviet Union and China, and the establishment of the Environmental Protection Agency, he became the only president to resign from the office, following the Watergate scandal.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Richard Nixon, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Richard Nixon

data.biography:
Richard Milhous Nixon, né le 9 janvier 1913 à Yorba Linda (Californie) et mort le 22 avril 1994 à New York, est un homme d'État américain. Membre du Parti républicain, il est le 36e vice-président des États-Unis du 20 janvier 1953 au 20 janvier 1961 puis le 37e président des États-Unis, du 20 janvier 1969 au 9 août 1974.

Issu d’une famille modeste, il étudie à l'université Duke, puis devient juriste. Durant la Seconde Guerre mondiale, il sert dans la Marine.

Il est élu en 1946 représentant des États-Unis pour le 12e district de Californie, puis sénateur en 1950. Son engagement dans l'affaire d'espionnage Alger Hiss établit sa réputation d'anticommuniste et le fait connaître au niveau national. Élu en 1952 vice-président des États-Unis sur le ticket républicain mené par Dwight D. Eisenhower, il occupe la vice-présidence de 1953 à 1961. Il brigue la succession d’Eisenhower en 1960, mais est défait par le démocrate John F. Kennedy à l'issue d'une élection très serrée. Il échoue également à devenir gouverneur de Californie en 1962. Sa traversée du désert s'achève six ans plus tard par son élection à la Maison-Blanche ; il est ainsi une des rares personnalités à accéder à la présidence après avoir perdu une élection présidentielle auparavant.

Pendant sa présidence, s'il commence par accroître l'engagement américain au Viêt Nam, il négocie la fin du conflit et met fin à l'intervention en 1973. Sa visite en République populaire de Chine en 1972 permet l'ouverture de relations diplomatiques entre les deux pays ; la même année, il instaure la Détente et le traité ABM avec l'Union soviétique. En politique intérieure, son administration soutient des politiques de dévolution du pouvoir du gouvernement fédéral vers les États. Il renforce la lutte contre le cancer et les drogues, impose un contrôle sur les prix et les salaires, fait appliquer la déségrégation dans les écoles du Sud, et crée l'Agence de protection de l'Environnement. Bien qu'il soit président lors de la mission Apollo 11, il réduit le soutien au programme spatial américain.

Il est réélu en 1972 en remportant 49 des 50 États américains, soit une des plus larges majorités jamais obtenues aux États-Unis. Son second mandat est marqué par le premier choc pétrolier et ses conséquences économiques, par la démission de son vice-président Spiro Agnew et par les révélations successives sur son implication dans le scandale du Watergate. L'affaire coûte à Nixon la plupart de ses appuis politiques et le conduit à démissionner le 9 août 1974, alors qu’il est menacé d’être destitué. Après son départ du pouvoir, il bénéficie d'une grâce de la part de son successeur, Gerald Ford.

Durant sa retraite, il écrit plusieurs ouvrages et s’implique sur la scène internationale, ce qui contribue à réhabiliter son image publique. Il meurt à l'âge de 81 ans, quelques jours après avoir été victime d'une grave attaque cérébrale. L'héritage et la personnalité de Richard Nixon continuent à faire l'objet d'importants débats.

Maria Carolina Casadevall Gonzaga é uma atriz brasileira. Ficou conhecida após interpretar Patrícia na telenovela Amor à Vida.

Neta de espanhóis, Maria começou a trabalhar como atriz com publicidade, fazendo seu primeiro comercial aos 16 anos. Logo após começou a se dedicar aos estudos cênicos de interpretação de TV e cinema com o diretor Fernando Leal. Também fez cursos de atriz na Escola de Atores de Wolf Maya.
data.name: Maria Casadevall

data.name: Maria Casadevall

data.biography:
Rupert S. Graves (born 30 June 1963) is an English film, television, and theatre actor. He is known for his roles in A Room with a View (1985), Maurice (1987), The Madness of King George (1984), and The Forsyte Saga (2002). Since 2010, he has starred as DI Lestrade in the BBC television series Sherlock.

Graves first came to prominence in costume-drama adaptations of E. M. Forster's novels A Room with a View (1985), and Maurice (1987), before going on to appear in films including A Handful of Dust (1988), The Madness of King George (1994), Different for Girls (1996), and Intimate Relations (1996). Graves's role in Intimate Relations won him the Best Actor award at the 1996 Montreal World Film Festival. He was also acclaimed for his portrayal of Young Jolyon Forsyte in the television miniseries The Forsyte Saga.

Later, he appeared in films such as V for Vendetta (2005), Death at a Funeral (2007), Horrible Histories: The Movie – Rotten Romans (2019), and Emma (2020), and in TV series such as Charles II: The Power & the Passion (2003), A Waste of Shame (2005), Sherlock (2010–), The Crimson Field (2014), and The Family (2016).
data.name: Rupert Graves

data.biography: Rupert Graves (* 30. Juni 1963 in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, England) ist ein britischer Schauspieler.  Graves wurde 1963 als Sohn von Mary Lousilla Graves und Richard Harding geboren. Er hatte eine wilde Jugend als Provinzpunk und tat sich bei der Einhaltung von Regeln schwer. Sein erster Job nach Beendigung der Schule war ein Gelegenheitsjob als Zirkusclown. Im Alter von 15 Jahren bekam er eine kleine Rolle in der britischen Kultserie Return of the Saint. Kurz darauf spielte er den Yan in einer Adaption von Enid Blytons Fünf Freunde. 1983 gab Graves sein Schauspieldebüt am Theater und 1985 erhielt er seine erste kleinere Kinorolle in dem Erfolgsfilm Zimmer mit Aussicht von James Ivory. Darauf folgte dann seine zweite Kinorolle in Maurice, für die er auch heute noch bekannt ist. Graves spielte seitdem in zahlreichen Kino- und Fernsehproduktionen. Auch am Theater in London und New York ist er des Öfteren zu sehen. Seit 2010 spielt er in der BBC-Fernsehserie Sherlock die Rolle des Inspector Lestrade.

Руперт Грейвс (англ. Rupert Simeon Graves; род. 30 июня 1963 года, Уэстон-сьюпер-Мэр, Сомерсетшир, Великобритания) — английский актёр театра и кино.

Родился 30 июня 1963 года в английском курортном городке Уэстон-сьюпер-Мэр графства Сомерсет в семье Марии Луизы Грейвс (в дев. Робертс), тур-оператора, и Ричарда Хардинга Грейвса, учителя музыки.

Образование получил в родном городе в специализированной спортивной академии Wyvern Community School. В пятнадцатилетнем возрасте Грейвс покинул заведение.

Начинал актёр в амплуа циркового клоуна.

Первая роль, принёсшая ему успех — Фредди Ханичёрч в фильме «Комната с видом», где партнёрами Грейвса по съёмочной площадке выступили такие именитые актёры, как Мэгги Смит, Джуди Денч и начинавшая кинокарьеру Хелена Бонэм Картер. Затем Грейвс был отмечен в киноленте «Морис» с Хью Грантом. Следующие его заметные роли: «Пригоршня праха», «Девочки любят иначе», «Интимные отношения», «Сага о Форсайтах».

Новая волна популярности обрушилась на Руперта благодаря роли детектива-инспектора Лестрейда в телесериале «Шерлок».

В 2015 году Грейвс был приглашен в сериал ABC «Семья», на основную роль мужа Клэр Уоррен в исполнении Джоан Аллен.

В 2020 году актера можно было увидеть в комедийной драме «Эмма», основанной на одноимённом романе Джейн Остин. Грейвс исполнил в фильме роль мистера Уэстона. В 2022 году вышла биографическая лента «Быть Сальвадором Дали», в которой Грейвс сыграл Капитана Мура.
data.name: Руперт Грейвс

data.biography:
鲁珀特·格雷夫斯（Rupert S. Graves，1963年6月30日-），英国电影、电视和戏剧演员。他因在《看得见风景的房间》（1985 年）、《莫里斯》（1987 年）、《乔治国王的疯狂》（1984 年）和《福赛特传奇》（2002 年）中的角色而闻名。自 2010 年以来，他在 BBC 电视连续剧《神探夏洛克》中饰演 DI Lestrade。

格雷夫斯首先在改编自 EM Forster 的小说《看得见风景的房间》（1985 年）和《莫里斯》（1987 年）的古装剧中崭露头角，然后继续出演电影，包括《一把尘埃》（1988 年）、《乔治国王的疯狂》（1994 年）、《女孩的不同》（1996 年）和《亲密关系》（1996 年）。格雷夫斯在《亲密关系》中的角色为他赢得了 1996 年蒙特利尔世界电影节的最佳男演员奖。他还因在电视迷你剧《福赛特传奇》中饰演年轻的乔里恩·福赛特而广受赞誉。

后来，他出演了《V字仇杀队》（2005 年）、《葬礼上的死亡》（2007 年）、《可怕的历史：电影——腐烂的罗马人》（2019 年）和《艾玛》（2020 年）等电影，以及《查理二世：权力与激情》（2003 年）、《浪费耻辱》（2005 年）、《神探夏洛克》（2010 年–）、《深红之地》（2014 年）和《家庭》（2016 年）。
data.name: 鲁珀特·格雷夫斯

data.biography:
魯珀特·格雷夫斯（Rupert S.Graves，1963 年 6 月 30 日-），英國電影、電視和戲劇演員。他因在《看得見風景的房間》（1985 年）、《情難禁》（1987 年）、《喬治國王的瘋狂》（1984 年）和《福賽特傳奇》（2002 年）中的角色而聞名。自 2010 年以來，他在 BBC 電視聯續劇《神探夏洛克》中飾演 DI Lestrade。

格雷夫斯首先在改編自 EM Forster 的小説《看得見風景的房間》（1985 年）和《情難禁》（1987 年）的古裝劇中嶄露頭角，然後繼續出演電影，包括《一把塵埃》（1988 年）、《喬治國王的瘋狂》（1994 年）、《女孩的不同》（1996 年）和《親密關係》（1996 年）。格雷夫斯在《親密關係》中的角色為他贏得了 1996 年蒙特利爾世界電影節的最佳男演員獎。他還因在電視迷你劇《福賽特傳奇》中飾演年輕的喬裏恩·福賽特而廣受讚譽。

後來，他出演了《V 字仇殺隊》（2005 年）、《倒瀉籮蟹搞喪禮》（2007 年）、《可怕的歷史：電影——腐爛的羅馬人》（2019 年）和《芳心愛漫遊》（2020 年）等電影，以及《查理二世：權力與激情》（2003 年）、《浪費恥辱》（2005 年）、《神探夏洛克》（2010 年–）、《深紅之地》（2014 年）和《家庭》（2016 年）。
data.name: 魯珀特·格雷夫斯

Snub Pollard (9 November 1889 – 19 January 1962) was an Australian-born vaudevillian, who became a silent film comedian in Hollywood, popular in the 1920s.

Born Harold Fraser, in Melbourne, Australia on 9 November 1889, he began performing with Pollard's Lilliputian Opera Company at a young age. Like many of the actors in the popular juvenile company, he adopted Pollard as his stage name. The company ran several highly successful professional children's troupes that traveled Australia and New Zealand in the late nineteenth and early twentieth century.

In 1908, Harry Pollard joined the company tour to North America. After the completion of the tour, he returned to the US. By 1915 he was regularly appearing in uncredited roles in movies, for example Charles Epting notes that Pollard can clearly be seen in Chaplin's 1915 short By the Sea. In later years, Pollard claimed Hal Roach had discovered him while he was performing on stage in Los Angeles.

Pollard played supporting roles in the early films of Harold Lloyd and Bebe Daniels. The long-faced Pollard sported a Kaiser Wilhelm mustache turned upside-down; this became his trademark. Lloyd's producer, Hal Roach, gave Pollard his own starring series of one- and two-reel shorts. The most famous is 1923's It's a Gift, in which he plays an inventor of many Rube Goldberg-like contraptions, including a car that runs by magnet power.

In early 1923, shortly after his second marriage, Pollard returned with his wife Elizabeth to see his relations in Australia. His visit attracted considerable attention, and he appeared again in several theatres to speak about the motion picture business. On his return to the US, he left Roach and joined the low-budget Weiss Brothers studio in 1926. There he co-starred with Marvin Loback as a poor man's version of Laurel and Hardy, copying that team's plots and gags.

In later years, Pollard claimed the Great Depression wiped out his investments, and he had been unable to "adjust to the talkies." However, in the 1930s, he played small parts in talking comedies, and was featured as comic relief in "B" westerns. Pollard's silent-comedy credentials guaranteed him work in slapstick revivals. He appeared with other film veterans in Hollywood Cavalcade (1939), The Perils of Pauline (1947), and Man of a Thousand Faces (1957). He also appeared regularly as a supporting player in Columbia Pictures' two-reel comedies of the mid-1940s.

Forsaking his familiar mustache in his later years, he landed much steadier work in films as a mostly uncredited bit player. He played incidental roles in scores of Hollywood features and shorts, almost always as a mousy, nondescript fellow, usually with no dialogue.

Snub Pollard died of cancer on 19 January 1962, aged 72, after nearly 50 years in the movie business. His interment was at Forest Lawn Memorial Park (Hollywood Hills).

For his contributions to motion pictures, Pollard has a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame at 6415½ Hollywood Boulevard.
data.name: Harry 'Snub' Pollard

data.biography: Harold Fraser (Melbourne, Austràlia, 9 de novembre de 1889 - Burbank, Califòrnia, 19 de gener de 1962), conegut professionalment com Snub Pollard, va ser un actor de vodevil que es va convertir en un còmic de cinema mut a Hollywood, popular als anys vint.

Gwilym Lee (born 24 November 1983) is a Welsh actor. He is best known for his film roles in Bohemian Rhapsody (2018) and Top End Wedding (2019). He is also known for his TV roles in Midsomer Murders (2013-2015), Jamestown (2017), and The Great (2020).

His first starring role was in the 1997-1998 television adaptation of the Animal Ark books. Aged 16, he started working on Richard III with the Royal Shakespeare Company. He appeared in a leading role in the final series of Land Girls (2011) and had several guest roles on television (including Ashes to Ashes (2009), Henry V (2012), Fresh Meat (2012), and Monroe (2012)).

He was commended in the 2008 Ian Charleson Awards for his appearance in the National Theatre's production of Oedipus and in 2009 played Laertes in the Donmar West End season. He won the first prize of the 2011 Ian Charleson Award for his role as Edgar in the 2010 King Lear production at the Donmar Warehouse. In 2012, he starred in Aleksei Arbuzov's The Promise, and, in 2013, he began a television starring role as DCI Barnaby's new sergeant, DS Charlie Nelson, in the 16th series of Midsomer Murders.

He played guitarist Brian May in the Queen biopic Bohemian Rhapsody (2018), for which earned him a nomination for Outstanding Performance by a Cast in a Motion Picture at the 25th Screen Actors Guild Awards.

Description above is from the Wikipedia article Gwilym Lee, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

data.biography:
Ben Chaplin, eigentlich Benedict John Greenwood, wurde am 31. Juli 1970 (nach manchen Quellen 1969) in Windsor, England geboren und ist ein britischer Schauspieler. Sein Vater war Bauingenieur, seine Mutter Lehrerin beziehungsweise Dramalehrerin. Schon in der Schulzeit entwickelte er ein Interesse für Schauspiel und trat in Schultheaterstücken auf. Mit 17 Jahren begann er ein Studium an der Guildhall School of Music and Drama in London.

Sein Debüt als Schauspieler gab Chaplin Anfang der 1990er Jahre im britischen Fernsehen, unter anderem mit einer Hauptrolle im TV-Film „Bye Bye Baby“ (1992). In Großbritannien wurde er mit der BBC-Serie „Game On“ (1995) bekannt, bevor er international größere Aufmerksamkeit durch Rollen im Kino erlangte, etwa als Fotograf in „Lügen haben lange Beine“ (1996) neben Uma Thurman, als Private Bell in Terrence Malicks Kriegsdrama „Der schmale Grat“ (1998) oder als Partner von Sandra Bullock in „Mord nach Plan“ (2002). Weitere wichtige Filme sind „Birthday Girl – Braut auf Bestellung“ (2001) mit Nicole Kidman sowie „Stage Beauty“ (2004), „The New World“ (2005), „Snowden“ (2016) und der Disney-Realverfilmung „Cinderella“ (2015). Zuletzt war er in Filmen wie „September 5“ (2024) und in der TV-Serie „The Nevers“ (2021–2023) zu sehen.

Ben Chaplin war und ist auch regelmäßig auf Theaterbühnen aktiv, unter anderem am Royal National Theatre oder in der britischen und amerikanischen Theaterszene. Für seine Rollen in „The Glass Menagerie“ (London) und „The Retreat from Moscow“ (Broadway) wurde er für den Olivier beziehungsweise Tony Award nominiert. Privat war er zeitweise mit der indischen Schauspielerin Rani Mukerji liiert.

data.biography: Faccia pulita e sorriso sempre caloroso, Stephen Collins è un attore statunitense classe 1947 che nella sua carriera ha lavorato in grandi produzioni come lo Star Trek di Robert Wise o Blood Diamond, film di Edward Zwick con Leonardo DiCaprio.

Stephen Weaver Collins (* 1. Oktober 1947 in Des Moines, Iowa) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, Regisseur und Autor. Er ist vor allem als Pastor Eric Camden in der Fernsehserie Eine himmlische Familie bekannt.

Nachdem Collins Erfahrungen als Theaterschauspieler gesammelt hat, stand er neben Burt Reynolds in der Serie Dan August zum ersten Mal vor der Kamera. Sein Spielfilmdebüt gab er 1976 in einer kleinen Rolle in Die Unbestechlichen neben Dustin Hoffman und Robert Redford. Es folgten Gastauftritte in Serien (u. a. Die Waltons) und Spielfilmrollen (u. a. in Star Trek – The Motion Picture als Captain/Commander Willard „Will“ Decker). 1981/82 spielte Collins in Die Himmelhunde von Boragora als Jake Cutter erstmals eine dauerhafte Serienrolle. Es folgten Hauptrollen in den Serien Tattingers (1987–1988), Working it Out (1990–1991) und Ein Strauß Töchter (Sisters, 1995–1996). Weiterhin war Collins auch in zahlreichen Kino- und Fernsehfilmen zu sehen (u. a. in Jumpin' Jack Flash und Der Club der Teufelinnen) und übernahm mehrere Gastrollen in Serien.

1996 bis 2007 spielte Collins in der Fernsehserie Eine himmlische Familie die Rolle des Reverend Eric Camden. Collins selbst führte bei drei Folgen der Serie Regie. Sein Regiedebüt gab er bereits 1992 mit dem Musical The Old Boy. Collins schrieb außerdem zwei Romane. Sein erster Roman, Eye Contact (1994) erreichte Bestsellerstatus, ein Erfolg, an den der Nachfolgeroman Double Exposure (1998) nicht anknüpfen konnte.

Von 2010 bis 2011 spielte Collins in der US-Fernsehserie My Superhero Family die Rolle des Dr. Dayton King.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Stephen Collins is an American former actor born on October 1, 1947, in Des Moines, Iowa. He is best known for his role as Eric Camden, the family patriarch on the television series "7th Heaven," which aired from 1996 to 2007. Collins also played notable roles such as Commander Willard Decker in "Star Trek: The Motion Picture" (1979) and had television roles in series like "No Ordinary Family" and "Revolution."

He grew up in Hastings-on-Hudson, New York, and graduated cum laude from Amherst College. His career spanned television, film, and theater, with early roles including appearances in "All the President's Men" and the cult TV series "Tales of the Gold Monkey." Collins was also nominated for an Emmy for his work in the miniseries "The Two Mrs. Grenvilles" and played John F. Kennedy in "A Woman Named Jackie." He acted alongside stars such as Diane Keaton and Shirley MacLaine in various films.

Collins' career ended in 2014 following his public confession to sexual abuse against minors. Beyond acting, he also authored psychosexual thrillers and performed in Broadway productions. Throughout his career, he was recognized for playing wholesome and authoritative characters, often embodying family-oriented roles
data.name: Stephen Collins

data.biography: Adriana Moraes Rêgo Reis (Rio de Janeiro, July 29, 1969) is a Brazilian actress. data.biography:
Cristina Lago é uma atriz brasileira atuando nos filmes Maré, Nossa História de Amor, Olhos Azuis e Bruna Surfistinha.

Nascida em Foz do Iguaçu, no estado de Paraná, e criada na cidade de Ouro Preto do Oeste, em Rondônia, Cristina Lago é filha do casal Marliz "Marinho" Henrique do Lago e Cely Maria Preto do Lago, empresários da Lojas Marvit e sempre nutriu o sonho de ser atriz. Quando criança começou a participar de peças de teatro de sua cidade, além de praticar aulas canto e piano com o professor Francisco Galdino Dantas. Em 2000 entrou para a faculdade de Direito, porém em 2001, aos 19 anos, abandonou o curso e mudou-se para o Rio de Janeiro para estudar na Faculdade de Dança Angel Vianna, onde fez tablado e estudou dança. No início do curso a atriz ainda não tinha onde morar, ficando hospedada em um hotel, até certo dia encontrar no jornal um quarto para alugar em um apartamento na mesma rua da faculdade. Após se formar como bailarina e atriz, Cristina fez alguns trabalhos de publicidade, trabalhando profissionalmente no teatro.

Em 2007 realizou os testes para o filme Maré, Nossa História de Amor, onde uma das exigências dos produtores era que canto e dança, facilitando a conquista do papél pela atriz que havia se formado nisso. O filme, lançado em 18 de abril de 2008, é uma adaptação de do clássico Romeu e Julieta tendo como cenário uma favela carioca, relacionando-se com os problemas sociais e preconceitos do dia-a-dia das pessoas que ali moram. Em 2009 foi escolhida para protagonizar o filme Olhos Azuis, do diretor José Joffily, sendo gravado totalmente em inglês, idioma de domínio da atriz.

Cristina esteve em cidades como Berlim, na Alemanha, Nova Iorque, nos Estados Unidos, Madri, na Espanha e Posnan, na Polônia divulgando o filme. Em 2010 a atriz protagoniza o curta-metragem Irmãos, onde vive a personagem Maria ao lado do ator Gustavo Falcão. Em 2011 gravou o filme Bruna Surfistinha, lançado em 25 de fevereiro de 2011, onde co-protagonizou na pele da prostituta Gabi, amiga da personagem principal. Gravou o curta-metragens Um Dia de Maria onde interpreta a protagonista Maria, uma mulher de 25 anos que se casa com um homem mais velho.
data.name: Cristina Lago

data.biography:
Luna Lou est une actrice française née le 1er décembre 2001 à Paris.

Luna Lou tombe dans le métier par hasard.  Repérée par Rachid Ferrache, elle est conviée, à tout juste 8 ans, à participer à Vole, son court-métrage hommage à Michael Jackson.  La caméra, la magie des plateaux l’enchantent immédiatement.  La fillette enchaîne alors les tournages.  Elle est recrutée pour devenir l’un des turbulents gamins de Vive la colo ! en 2012.  Diastème l’engage pour endosser le rôle de l'impertinente Laura dans la comédie familiale Juillet-Août.  Et dans le bouleversant Entre deux mères, programmé en mars 2017 sur TF1, elle est l'une des filles d'Odile Vuillemin.

Après Marvin ou la Belle Éducation d'Anne Fontaine et Le jour où j'ai brûlé mon cœur sur le harcèlement scolaire, l'adolescente donne la réplique à Benoît Poelvoorde et Valérie Bonneton dans Venise n'est pas en Italie.  En décembre 2019, les téléspectateurs de France 3 la découvrent lors de la Journée du handicap dans la fiction D'un monde à l'autre, où elle est la fille d'un Pascal Demolon devenu paraplégique à la suite d'un accident de voiture.  Version jeune de Sam dans les flash-backs de la saison 4 et fille de Fred Testot dans la comédie familiale Faites des gosses, Luna Lou est, dans l'unitaire de France 2 De l'autre côté, Manon, une apprentie de l’école d’horlogerie retrouvée morte au pied d’une falais
É atriz e modelo. Ela é meio britânica e meio tailandesa.

Chanidapa Pongsilpipat, nickname Best, is a Thai actor, model, and presenter under CH3. She graduated with a bachelor's degree from the Faculty of Fine Arts at Srinakharinwirot University, majoring in Acting and Directing with a minor in Business Administration.

Best was signed under Exact Studio from 2007 to 2012 and decided not to renew her contract after its expiration. In 2013, she signed with CH3 and has been working under CH3 since. She is best known for her role in the 2007 film The Love of Siam.

data.biography: Varitthisa Limthammahisorn, nicknamed Thisa or Thi, is a Thai-Chinese actress and model. She signed a 7 year contract with Channel 7. She has 2 siblings. She studied at Kasetsart University majoring in Business Administration and Accounting and graduates in 2013.
data.name: Varitthisa Limthammahisorn

data.biography: Poon Mitpakdee is a Thai actor. He is currently studying at the Falcuty of Journalism and Mass Communication, Thammasat University.
data.name: Poon Mitpakdee
ปูน มิตรภักดี

data.biography:
Poon Mitpakdee é um ator e cantor tailandês agenciado pela GMMTV. Ele graduou-se pela Faculdade de Jornalismo e Comunicação de Massa da Universidade Thammasat, com especialização em Rádio e Televisão. Foi convidado a ingressar na agência pelo diretor Aof Noppharnach, que identificou o seu potencial artístico.

Poon consolidou a sua carreira como protagonista no gênero BL ao interpretar o personagem Pun na série de sucesso "We Are" (2024), onde formou o casal oficial MarcPoon (ChainPunn) ao lado de Marc Natarit. Antes disso, ganhou experiência em papéis de suporte de destaque, como na série de mistério "Shadow" (2023), interpretando Josh, e na série "The Trainee" (2024). Em 2026, ele inicia uma nova fase como protagonista na série "My Romance Scammer", formando a sua primeira parceria oficial com Ohm Thitiwat (OhmPoon). Poon é reconhecido pela sua versatilidade e por ser um dos novos talentos mais carismáticos da GMMTV.
data.name: Poon Mitpakdee

data.biography: ممثل مصري من مواليد مدينة بورسعيد عام 1985م، وتخرج في كلية اللغات والترجمة بجامعة الأزهر، لم يعمل بالتمثيل بعد تخرجه مباشرة، بل عمل في شركة اتصالات كمسوق، ثم عمل في مجال الكتابة الساخرة وأصبح ضمن فريق الكتابة للبرنامج الساخر الذي يقدمه المذيع أكرم حسنى، ليذيع صيته أكثر وينضم لفريق كتابة برنامج البلاتوه ثم برنامج الشهير أبله فاهيتا، كل هذا قبل ظهوره كممثل، قدم فيديوهات باسم ( الموظف المثالي – نجوم بتحب مصر ) وهي فيديوهات كوميدية، ولاقت نجاحًا كبيرًا، خاصة بعدما بدأ في تصوير فيديوهات تمثيل بنفسه، وليظهر بعدها لأول مرة في برنامج snl بالعربي في موسميه الثالث والرابع حتى عام 2016، ليظهر كممثل حقيقي عام 2018 في مسلسل كلبش 2.
data.name: عمرو وهبة
